description: Changeset = a controller (matches api-reviewer's **/controller/** and **/api/** triggers) plus a response DTO (**/dto/**), both under src/main. api-reviewer must fire on the api/dto/controller paths, and the src/main reviewers (arch, refactor) fire too because the files also live under src/main. The test reviewers must not fire. Routing is path-only, so the files are created empty.
